about.intro: I am currently a Staff Analyst Data Scientist with a strong focus on machine learning and computer vision, backed by hands-on experience in maritime and manufacturing industries. With a solid foundation in industrial software integration and project management (IPMA Level D), I deliver innovative solutions that optimize performance and drive efficiency.
about.headline: Data Scientist & Project Manager
about.subheadline: Versatile Data Scientist with expertise in data science, software development and project management.

experience.company: Infineon Technologies Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd., SG

groups.heading: Process Excellence
bullets: Project Manager for cross-functional business projects in Business Process, Finance and Export Control domain
Developed full-stack web applications hosted on internal cloud platform
Technical member of ML-assisted Marketing Forecasting project that transformed rigid, quarterly, planning cycle into dynamic, market-driven demand forecasting.

groups.heading: Test Singapore Backend
bullets: Project Manager for Optical Character Recognition project to salvage overkill in marking text process
Developed Python scripts to ETL Final Test equipment alarm and warning statistics via Selenium
Developed Tableau Dashboard with equipment data to provide Final Test engineers and technicians clear overview on preventive maintenance tasks
Received good feedback for in-house sharing to ~50 employees without prior ML experience on Predictive Maintenance

groups.heading: Smart System Solutions Department (Smart Machine-Automated Quay Crane)
bullets: Manages Automated Quay Crane project by ensuring resources availability and timeline adherence
Performed tasks central to projects tendering, including specification write-up and technical scoring of proposals
Developed Python scripts to ETL month-long crane data for useful insights on operators benchmarking
Developed Extended Memobus Protocol (Yaskawa PLC) communication driver in Python for vendors applications
